name: Pwndbg RPC Sync
description: XML-RPC bridge for pwndbg/GDB live BN analysis
longdescription:
Starts a localhost XML-RPC server on the active BinaryView so external debuggers (pwndbg/GDB) can query decompilation, IL levels, call trees, and symbol resolution in real time.

**Usage:** Plugins → Pwndbg Sync → Start XML-RPC Server, then pair with the pwndbg extension from the same project repository (default endpoint `http://127.0.0.1:31337`).

**Author:** nyxFault

installinstructions.Linux: Copy the entire `binja_plugin` folder into `~/.binaryninja/plugins/` and restart Binary Ninja.
installinstructions.Darwin: Copy the entire `binja_plugin` folder into `~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/` and restart Binary Ninja.
installinstructions.Windows: Copy the entire `binja_plugin` folder into `%APPDATA%\Binary Ninja\plugins\` and restart Binary Ninja.

author: nyxFault
